note: Capsule public-mode broadcast wired in the web wallet (V13 step C). Three modes ship live: Open Note (max 80 char public), Structured Data (template_fields_open, default template_id PAYMENT_RECEIPT_V1, max 128-byte fields blob), and Certification (cert_instruction, max 64-byte note). Sealed-* modes and Document Reference still bridge to sost-cli with a clear error message. The previous preview-only banner is replaced by a green confirmation note that lists what is wired vs what is not. JS encoders ported from src/capsule.cpp byte-for-byte; buildAndSignTx now signs the payload bytes too, so the broadcast is rejected if anything mutates the capsule mid-flight. Auto-reload on open tabs within ~60 s; Ctrl+Shift+R if cached.
